About Us

Your Trusted Bridge to Gulf Opportunities

We specialize in connecting skilled Indian candidates with reputed companies across the Gulf region. From initial counselling to final departure, we are with you at every step.

Whether you are a fresh candidate looking for your first Gulf job, or an experienced professional seeking better opportunities — Flame Travels provides honest guidance, proper documentation, and end-to-end support to make your overseas journey smooth and successful.

Get Free Consultation →
What We Offer

Our Services

Comprehensive solutions for your overseas career and travel needs.

💼

Employment Visa

End-to-end employment visa processing for Gulf countries with company-sponsored documentation.

🌍

Tourist Visa

Quick and hassle-free tourist visa assistance for all Gulf destinations.

🕌

Umrah Visa

Dedicated Umrah visa processing with complete travel package coordination.

✈️

Air Ticket Booking

Domestic & international flight bookings at competitive rates.

🚆

Train Ticket Booking

Tatkal and regular train ticket booking across India.

📔

Passport Appointment

Assistance with passport application and renewal appointments.

🏥

GAMCA Medical

GAMCA-approved medical appointment booking and guidance.

🔒

PCC Appointment

Police Clearance Certificate appointment assistance.

🌐

All Country Visa

Visa assistance for any country destination, handled professionally.

📄

Documentation Guidance

Complete guidance on document preparation and attestation.

🎤

Interview Preparation

Mock interview sessions and coaching for Gulf company selections.

🤝

24×7 Online Assistance

Round-the-clock support via WhatsApp for all your queries.

Why Flame Travels

Why Choose Us

We are committed to making your Gulf dream a reality with honesty and professionalism.

🏢

Direct Company Requirements

We work directly with Gulf-based employers, ensuring genuine and verified job openings.

🔍

Transparent Process

No hidden charges, no false promises. Everything is clearly communicated at every step.

⚡

Fast Processing

Quick turnaround on visa applications and document processing saves your valuable time.

🎤

Interview Guidance

Expert coaching and mock interviews to ensure you are fully prepared for selection.

📄

Documentation Support

Step-by-step assistance for all required documents, attestations, and formalities.

🤲

Candidate Assistance

Personal attention to every candidate from registration to departure and beyond.

📱

24×7 Online Support

Always available on WhatsApp for queries, updates, and emergency support.

🏆

Trusted Partner

Established reputation built on successful placements and satisfied candidates.

How It Works

Your Journey to Gulf

1

Submit CV

Share your resume and details with us

2

Interview

Attend employer interview with our support

3

Documentation

Complete all required paperwork and attestations

4

Visa Processing

We handle your visa application end-to-end

5

Departure ✈️

Fly to your Gulf destination and begin your new journey
